case_title: KRISHNA REDDY VS. TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY REDDY, KRISHNA TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY REDDY, KRISHNA AS TO DEFENDANT TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) SERVED SEP-22-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDDY, KRISHNA AS TO DEFENDANT TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDDY, KRISHNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
